docket_entries.description: UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. PETITIONER GERALDINE SIAS WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND EXAMINED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.
